threats.title: Intentional credential exhaustion followed by factory reset (INS FB)
threats.detail: 3 consecutive auth failures followed by successful factory reset (INS FB) at exchange #undefined. Consistent with reset or re-provisioning workflow.

threats.title: Default PIN accepted by card — card is using factory credentials
threats.detail: VERIFY at exchange #undefined — "123456" matches known default

threats.title: Fast GEN AUTH (~24ms) — consistent with ECC or modern hardware
Identity data read from slot 5FC105 (trace does not confirm channel protection)
PIV applet reset — all keys, certs, PIN/PUK restored to factory defaults
threats.detail: Exchange #undefined: successful PIV RESET (INS FB). All prior lockout state is cleared. Subsequent provisioning activity operates on a clean card.
